title: Iran 'most oppressed' team at World Cup - Ghalenoei
summary: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei criticized World Cup organizers after his team faced last-minute travel restrictions, calling them the "most oppressed" team in the tournament. The constraints add to Iran's difficulties in a competitive group.
content: Head coach Amir Ghalenoei says his Iran side are the "most oppressed in the World Cup" after having last-minute travel restrictions imposed on them.

zh.title: 伊朗成为世界杯上"最受压迫"的球队——加莱诺埃
zh.summary: 伊朗教练阿米尔·加莱诺埃在其球队面临最后时刻的旅行限制后批评了世界杯组织者，称他们是锦标赛中"最受压迫"的球队。这些限制加剧了伊朗在竞争激烈小组中的困难。

title: Football Daily
summary: Cape Verde produced a stunning upset by holding Spain to a draw in their World Cup group match. The result highlighted the unpredictability of the tournament.
content: Guillem Balague reacts as Cape Verde hold Spain to a shock draw.

zh.title: 足球每日
zh.summary: 佛得角通过在世界杯小组赛中与西班牙打成平手，创造了惊人的冷门。这个结果突出了锦标赛的不可预测性。

title: 'Not a model' - Bielsa refuses to engage with World Cup photoshoot
summary: Uruguay coach Marcelo Bielsa defended his serious expression in the official World Cup team photoshoot, declining to participate in the ceremonial tradition. His unsmiling appearance prompted questions among observers.
content: Uruguay and former Leeds coach Marcelo Bielsa defends his stony-faced appearance in the official World Cup photoshoot.

zh.title: "不是模特"——比埃尔萨拒绝参加世界杯官方照片拍摄
zh.summary: 乌拉圭教练马塞洛·比埃尔萨为他在官方世界杯团队照片拍摄中的严肃表情辩护，拒绝参加这一仪式传统。他不笑的表现引发了观察者的疑问。

title: Listen: Will Clarke drop Shankland? What will McInnes bring Rangers?
summary: Scotland face crucial tactical decisions ahead of their World Cup match against Morocco, with questions about striker selection and team composition. Managerial speculation also continues around Derek McInnes and other coaching appointments.
content: Scotland face big calls vs Morocco. Plus Is Derek McInnes heading to Rangers?

zh.title: 听听：克拉克会弃用沙克兰德吗？麦金尼斯将为流浪者队带来什么？
zh.summary: 苏格兰在与摩洛哥的世界杯比赛前面临重要的战术决策，包括前锋人选和球队阵容的问题。同时，关于德里克·麦金尼斯和其他教练任命的主教练猜测也在持续发酵。

title: Meet the Iraq player set to make history for Pakistan
summary: Zidane Iqbal, a former Manchester United player, will become the first player of Pakistani heritage to feature at a men's World Cup when he plays for Iraq. His achievement represents a historic milestone for players of Pakistani descent.
content: Zidane Iqbal, a former Manchester United player, will make history when he plays for Iraq this summer, becoming the first player of Pakistani heritage to feature at a men's World Cup.

zh.title: 见见这位将为巴基斯坦创造历史的伊拉克球员
zh.summary: 前曼联球员齐达内·伊克巴尔将成为首位在男子世界杯上出场的巴基斯坦血统球员，代表伊拉克出战。他的成就代表了巴基斯坦裔球员的历史性里程碑。

title: Tunisia sack Lamouchi just one game into World Cup
summary: Tunisia sacked head coach Sabri Lamouchi just one game into their World Cup campaign, replacing him with experienced manager Hervé Renard. The dramatic move signals a significant tactical shift for the North African team.
content: Tunisia sack Sabri Lamouchi one game into their World Cup, with former Morocco and Saudi Arabia manager Herve Renard replacing him.

zh.title: 突尼斯在世界杯仅一场比赛后解雇拉穆奇
zh.summary: 突尼斯队在世界杯仅打一场比赛后就解雇了主帅萨布里·拉穆奇，由经验丰富的主教练埃尔维·雷纳德接替。这一戏剧性的举措标志着这支北非球队的重大战术转变。

title: 'McInnes and Rohl moves are done deals' - gossip
summary: Multiple managerial moves are reportedly imminent in Scottish football, with Rangers' Danny Rohl set to join Heart of Midlothian to be replaced by Derek McInnes. Falkirk's Barney Stewart is also poised to transfer to West Bromwich Albion.
content: Barney Stewart is reportedly poised to be sold to West Bromwich Albion by Falkirk as head coach Danny Rohl's exit from Rangers to be replaced by Heart of Midlothian's Derek McInnes appears to move closer.

zh.title: 'McInnes和Rohl的转会已成定局' - 传言
zh.summary: 据报道，苏格兰足球界多项主帅转会即将进行，兰恩斯队的丹尼·罗尔将加盟米德洛锡安心脏队，由德里克·麦金尼斯接替他。法尔柯克队的巴尼·斯图尔特也准备转会至西布罗姆维奇队。

title: What does future hold for Rashford as deadline passes?
summary: Barcelona declined to trigger a £26 million option to sign England's Marcus Rashford, leaving the World Cup star's future uncertain. The decision raises questions about his next destination in the transfer market.
content: Barcelona decided not to trigger the option that would have allowed them to sign Marcus Rashford for £26m, so what does the future hold for the England World Cup star?

zh.title: 随着截止日期的临近，拉什福德的未来会如何？
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那拒绝激活价值2600万英镑的选项来签下英格兰球星马库斯·拉什福德，使这位世界杯明星的未来充满不确定性。这一决定引发了关于他在转会市场上下一步去向的疑问。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 9
summary: The BBC features a daily World Cup guessing game challenging fans to identify a featured player as quickly as possible. Today's challenge focuses on identifying number 9 from the tournament.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜世界杯球星9号
zh.summary: 英国广播公司推出了一个每日世界杯猜谜游戏，挑战球迷尽快识别一名特定球员。今天的挑战集中在确定本届赛事的9号球员身份上。

title: Why Kante is still crucial for France  - Giroud
summary: France's World Cup-winning midfielder Olivier Giroud explains why N'Golo Kanté remains essential to Didier Deschamps' squad despite considering international retirement eight years ago. Kanté's continued importance underscores his enduring value to the national team.
content: France's World Cup winner Olivier Giroud explains why N'Golo Kante is still an important part of Didier Deschamps' squad, eight years after planning to retire from international football.

zh.title: 为什么坎特对法国仍然至关重要 - 吉鲁
zh.summary: 法国世界杯冠军中场球员奥利维埃·吉鲁解释了为什么恩戈洛·坎特对迪迪埃·德尚的球队仍然不可或缺，尽管他在八年前曾考虑国家队退役。坎特的持续重要性强调了他对国家队的持久价值。

title: Iran v Iran in the stands as politics and football intertwine
summary: Iran's match against New Zealand revealed deep political divisions among Iranian supporters, according to BBC correspondent Shaimaa Khalil. The encounter illustrated the complex intersection between football and politics in the nation.
content: The Iranian team may want to unite people but what the game with New Zealand revealed is just how divided many Iranians remain, writes BBC North America correspondent Shaimaa Khalil.

zh.title: 伊朗对伊朗：当政治与足球交织时的看台对立
zh.summary: 根据BBC记者Shaimaa Khalil的报道，伊朗与新西兰的比赛揭露了伊朗支持者之间的深层政治分歧。这场比赛说明了足球与政治在该国的复杂交叉。

title: Just scores double but New Zealand held by Iran in entertaining game
summary: Iran came from behind twice to secure a 2-2 draw with New Zealand in their Group G encounter at Los Angeles Stadium. The entertaining match featured multiple momentum shifts between the two sides.
content: Iran twice come from behind to draw 2-2 with New Zealand at the Los Angeles Stadium in their Group G encounter.

title: Are billions flooding into Saudi Pro League helping national team?
summary: Saudi Arabia earned a point against Uruguay, prompting questions about whether billions of dollars flowing into the Saudi Pro League are improving national team performance. The investment strategy's tournament impact remains to be fully assessed.
content: As Saudi Arabia earn creditable point against Uruguay, is the money flooding into the Saudi Pro League helping the national team?

zh.title: 流入沙特职业足球联赛的数十亿美元是否在帮助国家队?
zh.summary: 沙特阿拉伯在与乌拉圭的比赛中获得一分，这引发了人们的疑问：流入沙特职业足球联赛的数十亿美元是否在改善国家队的表现。这一投资策略对赛事的影响仍有待充分评估。

title: Pulisic trains apart; Poch says U.S. star 'good'
summary: US national team attacker Christian Pulisic trained off to the side as he recovers from a calf injury sustained in training, with coach Pochettino indicating he's doing well. Pulisic's fitness is crucial for the USMNT's World Cup campaign.
content: United States men's national team attacker Christian Pulisic trained off to the side at Monday's practice session as he attempts to recover from a calf injury he first sustained in training last week.

zh.title: 普利西奇单独训练；波切蒂诺称美国球星"状态不错"
zh.summary: 美国国家队前锋克里斯蒂亚诺·普利西奇在训练中因小腿伤恢复期间单独训练，教练波切蒂诺表示他状态良好。普利西奇的体能状况对美国队的世界杯战役至关重要。

title: 'Sensational!' - Wood and Just combine twice for New Zealand goals
summary: New Zealand's Chris Wood and Elijah Just combined for two spectacular goals against Iran in their Group G match at Los Angeles Stadium. Their partnership produced "sensational" finishing in the entertaining encounter.
content: Chris Wood and Elijah Just combine for two 'sensational' goals for New Zealand during their Group G match with Iran at the Los Angeles Stadium.

zh.title: '精彩!'——伍德和贾斯特为新西兰连进两球
zh.summary: 新西兰的克里斯·伍德和以利亚·贾斯特在洛杉矶体育场的小组赛对阵伊朗的比赛中联手打进了两个精彩进球。他们的配合在这场精彩的比赛中展现了'精彩'的终场能力。

title: Saudi Arabia hold off relentless Uruguay to earn draw
summary: Saudi Arabia earned a 1-1 draw against two-time world champion Uruguay in their Group H opener at Miami Stadium. The result demonstrates the smaller nation's ability to compete with tournament favorites.
content: Saudi Arabia hold firm against relentless pressure to earn a 1-1 draw against two-time world champions Uruguay in their Group H opener at the Miami Stadium.

zh.summary: 沙特阿拉伯在迈阿密体育场H组首战中以1:1战平两次世界冠军乌拉圭。这个结果展示了这个规模较小国家与锦标赛夺冠热门竞争的能力。

title: Spain won't panic yet about Cape Verde draw, but t...
summary: Spain opened their 2026 World Cup campaign with a 0-0 draw against underdog Cape Verde, a surprising result given Spain's pedigree, though the team has historically started slowly at major tournaments.
content: Spain have a history of starting slowly at World Cups before finding their form, but nobody -- not even them -- expected to open 2026 with a draw against tiny Cape Verde.

zh.title: 西班牙对佛得角平局还未慌张，但...

title: Cape Verde GK Vozinha stopped World Cup favorites ...
summary: Forty-year-old Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha has become one of the 2026 World Cup's most beloved players following his team's impressive performance. His journey from journeyman to World Cup standout has captured global attention.
content: Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha is a 40-year-old journeyman who is now one of the 2026 World Cup's most beloved players.

zh.title: 佛得角门神沃津哈阻挡世界杯热门球队
zh.summary: 四十岁的佛得角门神沃津哈凭借球队令人瞩目的表现，成为2026年世界杯最受欢迎的球员之一。他从籍籍无名球员到世界杯明星的历程已引起全球关注。

title: 'Huge goal!' - Araujo equalises for Uruguay against Saudi Arabia
summary: Maxi Araujo scored an 80th-minute equalizer for Uruguay against Saudi Arabia in Group H play. The goal helped Uruguay secure a 1-1 draw in their World Cup opener.
content: Maxi Araujo equalises in the 80th minute for Uruguay against Saudi Arabia at the Miami Stadium in their Group H encounter.

zh.title: "巨大的进球！" - 阿劳霍为乌拉圭扳平对阵沙特阿拉伯
zh.summary: 马克西·阿劳霍在第80分钟为乌拉圭打入扳平球，在H组比赛中对阵沙特阿拉伯。这粒进球帮助乌拉圭在世界杯首战中以1-1战平对手。

title: Lukaku seizes spotlight from Salah, De Bruyne in B...
summary: Romelu Lukaku delivered a strong performance for Belgium despite the team's struggles against Egypt, demonstrating the value of World Cup experience in a 1-1 draw.
content: While Belgium struggled at times vs. Egypt, Lukaku's display was a reminder of how valuable experience can be at the World Cup.

zh.title: 卢卡库从萨拉赫和德布劳内的阴影中脱颖而出
zh.summary: 罗梅卢·卢卡库尽管球队在对阵埃及的比赛中表现不佳，但仍为比利时队奉献了一场精彩表现，展现了世界杯经验的价值，最终1-1战平。
